Muitas empresas quebram no Brasil e quer saber quais são os motivos que levam para a quebra de empresas no nosso país o primeiro está na mentalidade, no modelo mental, na forma de idealizar o negócio, na forma de olhar para o negócio com uma concepção ultrapassada, uma concepção inadequada. inapropriada, uma concepção que não se sustenta. Então, é necessário que você, ao iniciar um empreendimento, esteja aberto para um novo momento da nossa economia. Não se prenda ao fato de que determinados setores ou uma pessoa que você viu teve sucesso. Isso significa dizer que você abrindo uma empresa no mesmo segmento e até no mesmo bairro, você não terá sucesso. Poderá não ter sucesso quanto aquela pessoa, porque depende do que você tem na sua mente como fundamento, como propósito, como objetivo e como metas claras para o seu negócio. Outro ponto fundamental também é a falta de organização. But ultimately, is Pronamp an excellent opportunity for your business or not?  Do you know what the most appropriate answer is?  It depends.  It depends on several factors.  What you intend to do with that money will guide your decision.  Let's imagine the following.  If you're looking for a line of credit, something isn't working in your business, something that's not unusual.  Ideally, your business would be successful enough for you to be able to reinvest those resources, not in the financial market, but back into your own business, so you could increase its turnover and achieve better results.  If this isn't happening and you need to raise capital for your business, it's a clear sign that something is wrong with your business.  You are thinking about treating an effect, but you may not know what the cause of that effect is.  Let's imagine the following.  If your operation isn't generating enough revenue to cover a positive result—that is, if your revenue is less than your costs and expenses— you're digging a hole in your business every month. This is a structural issue, not a philosophical one.   It 's not academic, it's not a matter of thought, it's a matter of arithmetic.  But this arithmetic problem needs to be solved through strategic thinking, not just on a whim. An opportunity has arisen now with Pronamp, I'll go there, get R$ 500,000, R$ 1,000, I have a good relationship with the bank, the bank will grant me R$ 500,000. I solved all my problems.  It will be? Could it be that you've started digging yourself into an even bigger problem?  You really need to understand what's happening in your operation.  Based on this understanding, you will determine what your business needs are.  Let's imagine that a company is losing money, its costs are high because it has a very bad, flawed production process .  Their equipment is obsolete; it cannot produce a volume that would generate lower costs.  Then perhaps you might think: "Look, with this funding, couldn't I acquire technology, machinery, equipment, and invest in production processes that would improve my productivity? This would reduce my costs and increase my profit margin." That's why we need to talk and understand. Many people are trying to encourage you to access this funding, but in an irresponsible way. We, who are online and have a large following, must be very responsible. We can lead people to make mistakes. And this is one of the mistakes that Pronamp can generate when you treat it irrationally, when you make a decision motivated by any issue other than viability, a feasibility analysis. If you truly need funding to improve your business results, if you have a reliable plan, realize that it is indeed feasible to implement and don't just stay as an idea. Then you have the possibility of accessing this funding, of generating better results, of achieving results that are superior to what you have today.  You can even manage to repay this loan and the interest in a way that is favorable to your business. Did you understand the message? This is an important message that you need to evaluate, and only you can make this decision. Now comment here what you thought of this information. Was it useful to you? As a business owner, how can you use Pronamp in a way that benefits your business, without making the mistakes that most people will make? Want to understand more about this topic? So follow along with this content and pay attention to this information, which is extremely important for you.  Many people will certainly take out this loan, they will be able to qualify for this loan, but they will make an inappropriate choice.  Do you want to know who's going to do it?  That company that is operating inefficiently, that has a detrimental result, that has a loss, that has an operation in which its expenses and costs are greater than its revenues.  This can't be solved with a loan, it just can't be solved.  It is resolved through a strategic alignment of what you need to make your operation viable.  Now, if you're going to take advantage of this and have decided to secure this funding, you need to understand the rules first.  I even have the possibility of getting R$ 500,000. Do I really need R$ 500,000?  It's no use suddenly being qualified if you don't need R$ 500,000 or R$ 1,000; you need to obtain the necessary funds.  And what is it necessary for ?  What do you intend to do with this resource?  I want to borrow 200,000 to pay these bills that I'm having trouble paying.  This won't solve your problem unless you have very high financing that makes you believe that taking out a Pronamp loan might yield better results.  This will cause you to put off dealing with your problem for a little while longer .  Because if you are indeed raising funds and you have debt, and you are going to use Pronamp to pay off your debts, there is something wrong with your operation.  We're back to the operation again.  You need to resolve this issue regarding your company's operations. Let's assume you've overcome that phase, that you truly don't have that problem anymore, and that you've identified the causes, allowing you to address them and achieve better results.  For example, a company that lacks working capital and needs to buy on credit.  And when you buy on credit, you don't have a favorable relationship with your supplier.  When you consider a Pronamp loan, which can inject working capital into your business, you may have the opportunity to negotiate prices with your suppliers, obtain better conditions, and thus increase your profit margin.  And this is what will make your idea, your plan to secure Pronamp funding for your business, viable.  Did you understand the logic? Because there are many people who will use these funds to pay off debt.  There are many people who will use this money to try to buy equipment that doesn't produce results.  Many people will think, "No, but I need to have a well- equipped company."  But if a well- equipped company isn't generating results, you can exacerbate the poor performance.  That's what you need to understand.  Now, if you are actually going to invest in your productive capacity, you will produce more, with less cost, and with this you will have a better result in your company. What you need to verify is whether the injection of this resource will and can generate such a satisfactory result that it will be sufficient for you to have a superior result that can cover the cost of this loan, because in some time you will need to pay it back.  And when the time comes to pay, if you're not prepared, you'll erode your assets due to a misguided decision.  Do you now understand the logic that must be followed to contract or not contract, to obtain or not obtain, to have access or not have access to Pronamp?  Regardless of the bank's rating, whether they approve it or not, you first need to understand the following: as a business owner, within your business plan, have you understood that having access to Pronamp, this resource of up to R$ 500,000, is actually an advantage for your business?  Is it feasible?  These are the questions you need to ask.  Now comment below what you thought of this information. Were they helpful to you?  If you found them helpful, leave a comment. Aliás, se você tem recursos aplicados além do que você tem do seu negócio, também uma visão inadequada, pois se você tem uma margem de lucro favorável no seu negócio, dificilmente você vai conseguir no mercado financeiro uma aplicação que que possa cobrir um fator que seja melhor do que você tem numa operação. Tô dizendo o seguinte, vamos imaginar que uma empresa tenha 15% de lucro líquido, que é um bom resultado. Você não acha? Vamos imaginar que essa empresa pegue esse recurso e aplique para melhorar as suas condições de ofertar ao mercado, como por exemplo, vou comprar um lote de produtos que tem alto giro e eu consigo aumentar a minha lucratividade através do meu poder de compra. Vou comprar 500.000 1 de um produto que tem alta rotatividade, que eu faço girar várias vezes a cada mês. Aí sim nós estamos falando de algo que é saudável, pois você pode ter, por exemplo, um compromisso do Pronamp de 500.000 que tem que pagar 20% de juros ao ano. Mas se você tem uma operação que gera mais de 20% ou até mesmo 15% ao mês, num ano você terá um giro suficiente para cobrir os encargos desse é nesta linha de de raciocínio que você deve seguir. É nesta linha de raciocínio que vai fazer com que você tenha mais informações para tomar a decisão mais adequada para o seu negócio. Não se iluda com as informações e com a tentação só dos fatos que estão postos, como por exemplo, 500.000, 24 meses de carência e você pode pagar em até 96 meses. A ineficiência do seu negócio só será superada, só será melhorada se você aplicar o recurso de forma adequada. Entendeu o recado? Agora comenta aqui o que que você achou dessa informação. Ela foi útil para você? Se ela foi útil, deixa um comentário. Foi útil? E se você acha que ela pode ser útil para mais pessoas, sabe o que você pode fazer? Pode enviar lá para aqueles seus amigos e familiares que você tem lá naqueles grupos do WhatsApp e do Facebook. Aquele seu cunhado, cunhada, aquele seu primo, sua prima, seu irmão, sua irmã, seu pai, sua mãe, seu tio, sua tia, aquele vizinho que você tem, aquele colega de trabalho, aquele seu concorrente, aquele seu amigo, nós precisamos espalhar essa informação que é uma informação de utilidade pública.
